violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door seals found torn/damaged on refrigerator and freezer inside prep kitchen.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Multiple boxes found stored directly on floor.
Toilet facilities. — ---Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
